title: Kenyan Floral Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Kenyan-inspired stir fry with floral flavors and a creamy yogurt sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add bell pepper and carrots and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in Kenyan spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add floral tea and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in yogurt and cook until heated through.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
